title: verbena litoralis var. subglabrata
intro: Verbena litoralis var. subglabrata, a variant of the seaside verbena plant, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family that is native to the coastal regions of South America. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Verbena litoralis var. subglabrata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health enthusiasts.
